login.privacyReminder: Your privacy is protected — Username only, no tracking
login.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign Up
login.failedMessage: Could not log in. Please check your details and try again.

register.privacyText: We don't collect personal information. Just pick a username.
register.securityNote: Keep your password somewhere safe. Without an email, you'll need to answer security questions to recover your password.
register.termsSuffix: ; I have read and accept them.
register.haveAccount: Already have an account? Log In
register.failedMessage: Could not create account. Please try again.
register.usernameTakenAlert: This username is already taken. Please choose another one.
register.usernameInvalidAlert: Username must be 3-20 characters and may contain letters, numbers and underscores.
register.usernameWaitAlert: Please wait for the username check result.
register.passwordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters.

errors.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters
errors.passwordMin6: Password must be at least 6 characters

resetPassword.usernameStepDescription: Enter your username to retrieve your security questions
resetPassword.newPasswordStepDescription: Choose a strong password for your account
resetPassword.questionsNotFound: No security questions found for this username.
resetPassword.noQuestionsContactSupport: No security questions found for this username. Please contact support.
resetPassword.invalidServerResponse: Invalid response from the server. Please contact support.
resetPassword.questionsMisconfigured: Security questions are not configured properly. Please contact support.
resetPassword.passwordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.tokenNotFound: Reset key not found. Please verify your security questions again.
resetPassword.resetFailed: Could not reset password. Please try again.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password was reset successfully! You can now log in with your new password.

setupSecurity.explanationMain: Set up security questions for password recovery
setupSecurity.explanationSub: Choose questions only you can answer
setupSecurity.infoText: Don't forget your answers — they are case-sensitive and required for password recovery
setupSecurity.skipWarning: You won't be able to recover your password
setupSecurity.answersMaxLength: Answers must be fewer than 50 characters.
setupSecurity.setupFailedMessage: Could not save security questions. Please try again.
setupSecurity.skipDialogMessage: If you forget your password, you won't be able to recover it. Are you sure?

questions.birthCity: What city were you born in?
questions.firstPet: What was the name of your first pet?
questions.firstSchool: What was the name of your first school?
questions.mothersMaidenName: What is your mother's maiden name?

welcome.valueReviewText: No category limits — from coffee shops to cheese brands, from businesses to experiences.
welcome.valueFactsText: A clear distinction between verified facts and personal opinions.
welcome.valueReputationText: Earn a credibility score with helpful and accurate reviews.
welcome.haveAccount: Already have an account? Log In
welcome.guestDescription: Explore Bilinç without an account. Sign up to share reviews and facts.

onboarding.slide1Description: From coffee shops to cheese brands — no category limits
onboarding.slide2Description: Important factual information is clearly separated from personal reviews
onboarding.slide3Description: Earn points by writing helpful reviews. Unlock fact reporting at 500 points.
onboarding.factExample: This restaurant was inspected and passed all health and safety requirements.
